case_title: ANTONINO SUBIJANO VS. JASMINE DAVIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$250.00); DOCUMENT STAMPED: "BY FAX" SERVED MAY-09-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $350.00) SERVED MAY-01-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, JASMINE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-12-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ANTONINO SUBIJANO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FARMER'S INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SANDRA RODRIGUEZ, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT JASMINE DAVIS IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE JULY HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,525.00 FILED BY SUBIJANO, ANTONINO AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, JASMINE FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. AT THE LAST HEARING PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
